text:

Author: kp

Log:
  MFC r344797:

  tun tests: Test renaming and destroying a tun interface in a vnet jail

  There was a problem destroying renamed tun interfaces in vnet jails. This was
  fixed in r344794. Test the previously failing scenario.

  PR:		235704
